tasks.title: Fix _recordDownloadHistory to save storagePath
tasks.description: The storagePath field in DownloadHistory is never populated. Use downloadObject.files[].path to save the actual S3-compatible path for each track after download completes.

tasks.title: Create S3 streaming utility
tasks.description: Create a reusable utility to get an S3 client from app settings and convert storagePath to S3 key. Handles GetObjectCommand with Range header support.

tasks.title: Create GET /api/v1/stream/[trackId] route
tasks.description: API route that authenticates user, looks up DownloadHistory, streams the file from S3 with HTTP Range support (for seeking). Returns proper Content-Type based on file extension.

tasks.title: Create usePlayerStore (Zustand)
tasks.description: Full player state: current track, play queue, playback state, volume, repeat/shuffle, next/prev navigation. Separate from usePreviewStore (which stays for 30s Deezer clips).

tasks.title: Create Player component
tasks.description: Full audio player UI with progress bar (seekable), volume control, next/prev, queue display. Uses <audio> element pointed at /api/v1/stream/{trackId}.

tasks.title: Integrate play buttons in download history / playlists
tasks.description: Add play buttons on tracks in download history and playlist views that trigger usePlayerStore.play(track).
